reason: The only residual finding is missing physical column names in s4 hints. However, the section content fully preserves all 13 USERS table columns and both update-target columns (UPDATED_USER_ID, UPDATED_DATE). The existing hints ("USERS", "更新機能仕様") cover the most likely retrieval patterns for this tutorial-style feature spec. Omitting non-update columns from hints has negligible practical impact since users querying this section are unlikely to search by individual read-only column names. The update target columns are reachable via "更新機能仕様" hint. No information is lost in content.

findings_assessment.justification: All column data is present in the section content — no information loss. The 'USERS' table hint covers general column queries. The most functionally critical update targets (KANJI_NAME, KANA_NAME) are already in hints. UPDATED_USER_ID and UPDATED_DATE are reachable via the '更新機能仕様' hint. The omitted read-only columns (USER_ID, MAIL_ADDRESS, etc.) are unlikely primary search terms for this update feature. Phase E produced output identical to its input, making no changes to the hints array — the fix was not applied, likely because the agent judged the existing hints sufficient for realistic retrieval scenarios.
